sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85445" key="polu/treptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-τρεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-turning, changeable,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.423a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
